title: One Block Gravity Changer
description: tart from a single regenerating block floating in the void, but with reduced gravity that changes how you move, jump, and survive.
body:
Start from a single regenerating block and expand your island in the void, just like classic One Block. The difference is reduced gravity, which changes movement, jumping, and combat.

You jump higher, fall slower, and knockback feels stronger. Building and fighting require more control, since it’s easier to lose balance and fall. 

The modpack keeps the standard phase progression while adding a new challenge through altered physics.
